AC1.verified: startDebug() reads #runProfileSelect.value, includes profileName in POST body

AC2.verified: debugAutoscroll=false default, toggle button in HTML, highlightDebugStep/renderConsole check flags

AC3.verified: explicit continue after loop handler in executeSteps prevents fall-through to atomic handler

AC4.verified: contextmenu listener checks .step-card then .block-header/.block-container[data-path], uses data-path

AC5.verified: data/python/ exists, player reads step.pyFile from PYTHON_DIR, pyFile takes precedence over pyOverride

AC6.verified: data/blocks/ has 27 JSON files, GET /api/blocks returns 200 with 2990 bytes, editor loads via loadBlockDefinitions()

AC7.verified: resolveBlockDef() resolves from blockDefinitions with fallback to ACTION_ICONS/ACTION_NAMES then ❓

AC8.verified: persistent.json in data/variables/, loadPersistentVars/savePersistentVars in settings.js, player loads at start and saves after execution

AC9.verified: data/variables/README.md documents all fields and filters

AC10.verified: step.disabled toggle on cards/blocks, .step-disabled CSS, player skips with step-skipped broadcast

AC11.verified: .drag-insert-line CSS, showInsertionLine() inserts before target, clearAllDragStyles removes

python-double-exec.detail: Removed 3 duplicate python-output broadcasts from callers — executePython already broadcasts in real-time

debug-restart-crash.detail: close/error handlers now check process identity before cleanup/broadcast; old entry deleted before spawn

python-utf8-encoding.detail: Added encoding='utf-8' to open() and ensure_ascii=False to json.dump() in both Python wrapper templates

notes: All 12 original ACs remain PASS — no regressions from round 2 fixes
Round 2 fixes are minimal: 3 line removals, 4 line modifications, 8 lines in close/error guard
Syntax verified with node --check for both modified files
